  • Organization
  • Settings

New Virtual Machine

  1. Home
  2. New Virtual Machine

1. VPS Information

Basic identity and notes for this virtual machine.

2. Select OS / Image

Chon mot image base phu hop voi workload du kien.

3. Choose Resource Package

CPU, memory va disk duoc resolve tu catalog package dang active.

Loading active VPS packages...

4. Select Zone

Chon zone de dat workload, khong can chon region rieng.

5. Authentication & Security

Thong tin dang nhap root va khoa SSH cho lan ket noi dau tien.

Root password

Mat khau phai dat cung rule nhu luong dang ky tai khoan.

Password requirements

  • At least 8 characters
  • One lowercase letter
  • One uppercase letter
  • One number
  • One special character
  • Passwords match

6. Additional Options

Bat them cac tinh nang ho tro van hanh cho VPS nay.

7. Finalize Setup

Nhan tag va project de doi ngu van hanh quan ly de hon.

Provisioning Summary

Tong hop package, image, zone va access mode duoc gui toi hypervisor API.

VPS NameUnspecified
Selected ImageUbuntu 24.04
PackageNo active package
Zone
Add-onsBackups, Monitoring, Private Net
ComputePending package
StoragePending package
AccessPassword pending
